Join Us

Contact & Join

Everyone is welcome. Come fold with us — no experience necessary.

  • Contact Form
  • Mailing List
  • Social Media
Meeting Info

Come Fold With Us

We meet virtually on the first Saturday of every month. All skill levels welcome — free to attend, no registration required.

When
First Saturday of every month
Time
Update with your time — e.g. 1:00–3:00 PM PT
Where
Virtual — via Zoom
Cost
Free — no registration required
Zoom Link
Update with Zoom link
Email
perlamyers@gmail.com
Say Hello

Send a Message

Have a question? Want to share something? Reach out — we'd love to hear from you.

Stay Connected

Join Our Mailing List

Get meeting reminders, event announcements, guest folder news, and origami updates delivered straight to your inbox. We send just enough to keep you informed — never enough to be annoying.

  • Monthly meeting reminders with Zoom link
  • Announcements about special events and guest folders
  • Convention news from the origami world
  • Occasional highlights from our members

Mailchimp signup form goes here.
See comment in HTML for setup instructions.

Find Us Online

Social Media

Follow along, share your folds, and connect with the community.

Facebook

Follow our page for meeting announcements and community updates.

Instagram

Photos of member creations, meeting moments, and origami inspiration.

YouTube

Video tutorials and recordings from our folding sessions.

OrigamiUSA

We're proud members of OrigamiUSA — the national origami organization.
GSDOG

Greater San Diego Origami Group
San Diego, California
